description: ACH inbound transaction file format contract

columns.name: account_id
columns.description: Must reference a known account in bank.accounts

columns.name: merchant_id
columns.description: Optional — null accepted for merchant-free transactions

columns.name: direction
columns.description: Debit or Credit — case-sensitive, exactly one character, lowercase rejected by validation

columns.name: amount_cents
columns.description: Whole cents — must be a positive integer, zero and negatives rejected by validation

columns.name: txn_date
columns.description: ISO 8601 date — no time component, US formats rejected

WARNING: extra column appended beyond expected columns
COMPATIBLE: extra blank lines at end of file
